name: Hell's Paradise RPG
description:
☙ | Hell's Paradise RPG!!

☙ | Four intros - 1st one you're a convict, 2nd you're part of the Yamada Asaemon, 3rd you're a Tensen, 4th you make your own story.

——————•°•✿•°•——————

i finally have the hells paradise rpg requested by @tom1112 , so consider this my christmas gift lmao. more requests onegai 🙏
